abilities.name: Blade Rush
abilities.text: While resolving the Charge action, this model may move through enemy models. Deal 1 damage to enemy models moved through this way.

abilities.name: Promised to the Flame
abilities.text: Once per activation. Reduce all damage dealt to this model by 1 while it is within 2" of a model with a Burning token.

abilities.name: Ruthless
abilities.text: This model ignores the (unusual_defense) abilities of other models.

actions.name: Torch and Blade
actions.effects: This model may remove one marker or piece of destructible terrain within 2" of the target.

triggers.name: Kindle
triggers.text: Target must have a Burning token. Deal 1 damage to the target.

triggers.name: Blaze
triggers.text: Models damaged by this action gain a Burning token.

actions.name: Immolate
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If this action receives a raise, this model may remove a Burning token from the target to deal +3 damage.

triggers.name: Good for a Laugh
triggers.text: Draw two cards, then discard a card.

actions.name: Burn Away Pain
actions.effects: This model heals 2 and gains a Burning token.

triggers.name: Heatwave
triggers.text: Models within (aura)2" gain a Burning token.

actions.name: Onward
actions.effects: This model may declare the Walk action.

triggers.name: Burning Vitality
triggers.text: Once per activation. This model heals 2.

triggers.name: Shooting Sparks
triggers.text: Models within (aura)1" resolve their Burning tokens.
